step1_tropical_gap.description: Step 1: Tropical YM has automatic mass gap T812.

step6_decompact.description: Step 6: Decompactification via T815 (lattice gap survival) + T823 (cluster decomp). Gap persists on R^4.

t828_theorem.description: T828: INDEPENDENT SECOND PROOF via six-step DUY transfer. Completely independent of Balaban. Two proofs of YM mass gap exist. T828.
t828_theorem.reason: Two independent proofs. Same pattern as Hodge.
